meaning: 1. to write a play; 2. scenario; 3. dramatist; 4. screenwriter
sentence: 她是那部热门电视剧的编剧。
pinyin: Tā shì nà bù rè mén diàn shì jù de biān jù.
english: She is the screenwriter of that popular TV drama.

sentence: 这支股票今天下跌了两个点。
pinyin: Zhè zhī gǔpiào jīntiān xià diē le liǎng gè diǎn.
english: This stock dropped two points today.

sentence: 他的别号是“老顽童”，朋友都这么叫他。
pinyin: Tā de biéhào shì “lǎo wántóng”, péngyǒu dōu zhème jiào tā.
english: His alias is “Old Naughty Kid”, and his friends all call him that.

sentence: 这个软件支持多用户同时在线操作。
pinyin: Zhè gè ruǎn jiàn zhī chí duō yòng hù tóng shí zài xiàn cāo zuò.
english: This software supports multiple users operating online at the same time.

meaning: 1. curve; 2. curved line; 3. indirect; 4. in a roundabout way
sentence: 图表上的曲线显示销售额在持续上升。
pinyin: Tú biǎo shàng de qū xiàn xiǎn shì xiāo shòu é zài chí xù shàng shēng.
english: The curve on the chart shows that sales are continuing to rise.
